title: Sugar-Free Midnight Hoisin Pizza
description: A savory and dense Italian (Neapolitan) pizza featuring a unique blend of hoisin sauce for a midnight craving, served sugar-free.

ingredients.name: Hoisin Sauce
ingredients.notes: Sugar-free hoisin sauce is available in many health food stores

ingredients.name: Tomato Paste
ingredients.notes: Can be found at grocery stores with international foods

ingredients.name: Fresh Herbs (optional)
ingredients.notes: Such as basil or parsley for garnish

instructions: Spread a thin layer of hoisin sauce evenly on the pizza base.
Add tomato paste, garlic powder, and salt-free Italian seasoning mix over the sauce. Mix well until all ingredients are combined smoothly.
Sprinkle fresh herbs if using for garnish.
Place the pizza in the preheated oven and bake for 10-15 minutes or until the crust is golden brown and slightly crispy.
Remove from oven and let it cool down before serving.
